options.sources_format:
Types: deb
URIs: https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu
Suites: {suite}
Components: stable
Architectures: $(dpkg --print-architecture)
Signed-By: /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc

options.check: export NVM_DIR="${NVM_DIR:-$HOME/.nvm}"; test -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" --no-use && nvm version default 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^v24'
options.install: export NVM_DIR="${NVM_DIR:-$HOME/.nvm}"; PROFILE=/dev/null bash -c 'curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v0.40.3/install.sh | bash'; . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" --no-use; nvm install 24 --latest-npm; nvm alias default 24; nvm use --silent default

[ -d "$HOME/.oh-my-zsh" ] || sh -c "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh/master/tools/install.sh)" "" --unattended; D="${ZSH_CUSTOM:-$HOME/.oh-my-zsh/custom}/plugins"; [ -d "$D/zsh-autosuggestions" ] || git clone --depth=1 https://github.com/zsh-users/zsh-autosuggestions "$D/zsh-autosuggestions"; [ -d "$D/zsh-syntax-highlighting" ] || git clone --depth=1 https://github.com/zsh-users/zsh-syntax-highlighting "$D/zsh-syntax-highlighting"; (cd $HOME/.oh-my-zsh && git pull --quiet); for p in zsh-autosuggestions zsh-syntax-highlighting; do git -C "${ZSH_CUSTOM:-$HOME/.oh-my-zsh/custom}/plugins/$p" pull --quiet; done
